title: Receipt
description: A payment receipt issued after a transaction is captured. Receipts are immutable after issuance. The schema_version field aligns with the private platform's payment_receipt.v1 schema. The hash field is the SHA-256 digest of the canonical receipt payload.

id.description: Unique receipt identifier. Always prefixed with rcpt_.

schema_version.description: Schema version identifier. Always 'payment_receipt.v1' in V1.

transaction_id.description: The transaction this receipt was issued for.

amount.description: Amount in minor units (cents for USD).

rail.description: Payment rail used for this transaction.

hash.description: SHA-256 digest of the canonical payment receipt payload. Use this for independent verification.

signature_present.description: True if the platform has signed this receipt. The signing key can be discovered at /.well-known/certifieddata.json.

created_at.description: RFC 3339 UTC timestamp when the receipt was issued.

livemode.description: True for live mode receipts, false for sandbox.
